triageFlags.title: Credit Score in Sub-Prime Tier
triageFlags.description: The applicant's credit score places them in the Sub-Prime tier, indicating higher risk.
triageFlags.recommendation: Consider stricter lending criteria or additional guarantees.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, a score of 575 falls into the Sub-Prime tier, requiring stricter lending criteria to mitigate risk.

triageFlags.title: Vehicle Age Exceeds Policy Limit
triageFlags.description: The vehicle's age at the start of the agreement exceeds the maximum allowed by policy.
triageFlags.recommendation: Reassess the vehicle's eligibility or consider an alternative asset.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy specifies a maximum vehicle age of 8 years (96 months) at the start of the agreement. This vehicle is 111 months old, exceeding the limit.

content.reasoning: The credit score places the applicant in a higher risk category, and the vehicle's age at the start of the agreement exceeds policy limits. However, the affordability metrics and LTV are compliant, suggesting manageable risk with proper mitigations.
